description: Exclusively launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — Hypersonic Missile (HYPERSONIC) reflects the reality that hypersonic weapons dominate the battlefield with unmatched speed, maneuverability, and strategic precision. HYPERSONIC delivers its holders, traders, and users instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capability, making it a high-velocity, superior digital asset worldwide.
name: Hypersonic Missile
